# Chapter 9: Power electronics: drives, inverters, grid-tie  (~120 pp)
- 9.1 The big picture: switched-mode power conversion (12) · 9.2 DC-DC converters: buck, boost, buck-boost, isolated topologies (15) · 9.3 Inverters: single-phase, three-phase, multilevel (15) · 9.4 Rectifiers and power-factor correction (12) · 9.5 Motor drives: BLDC, induction, synchronous, field-oriented control (18) · 9.6 Battery management systems and EV powertrains (15) · 9.7 Grid-tied power electronics: PV inverters, STATCOMs, HVDC (15) · 9.8 Failure section: thermal, EMI, switching transients, capacitor end-of-life (18)

**Archetype**: control, transport, failure. **Project**: design and build a buck converter; characterise efficiency vs load. **Exercises**: 35.
